---
title: "EMA descriptive analyses"
author: "Milena Musial"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Preps

```{r}
rm(list=ls())

libs<-c("tidyverse", "stringr", "plyr", "dplyr", "lme4", "lmerTest","kableExtra", "gmodels", "sjPlot", "rstatix", "ggpubr")
sapply(libs, require, character.only=TRUE)

# define paths
ema_path <- '/Users/milenamusial/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-Charité-UniversitätsmedizinBerlin/PhD/04_B01/ILT/WP2_ILT_DATA/EMA'
demo_path <- '/Users/milenamusial/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-Charité-UniversitätsmedizinBerlin/PhD/04_B01/ILT/WP2_ILT_DATA/RedCap'

# load files
load(file.path(ema_path, "ema_data_n22.RData"))
load(file.path(demo_path, "redcap_n22_new.RData"))

# create merged file
# ema_redcap <- left_join(ema_data, redcap_new)

```

For sample characteristics, execute 00_demo_psychometric_analyses.qmd

# Adherence and time

```{r}
adherence <- ema_data %>%
  select(ID, sampling_day) %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(last_day = max(sampling_day, na.rm = TRUE),
                   total_days = n(),
                   duration = max(sampling_day, na.rm = TRUE)-min(sampling_day, na.rm = TRUE)+1)

last_day_summary <- adherence %>%
  select(ID, last_day) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean = mean(last_day, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(last_day, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()-sum(is.nan(last_day))),
                   min = min(last_day, na.rm = TRUE),
                   max = max(last_day, na.rm = TRUE),
                   ci_l = ci(last_day, na.rm = TRUE)[2],
                   ci_u = ci(last_day, na.rm = TRUE)[3])

total_days_summary <- adherence %>%
  select(ID, total_days) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean = mean(total_days, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(total_days, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()-sum(is.nan(total_days))),
                   min = min(total_days, na.rm = TRUE),
                   max = max(total_days, na.rm = TRUE),
                   ci_l = ci(total_days, na.rm = TRUE)[2],
                   ci_u = ci(total_days, na.rm = TRUE)[3])

duration_summary <- adherence %>%
  select(ID, duration) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean = mean(duration, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(duration, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()-sum(is.nan(duration))),
                   min = min(duration, na.rm = TRUE),
                   max = max(duration, na.rm = TRUE),
                   ci_l = ci(duration, na.rm = TRUE)[2],
                   ci_u = ci(duration, na.rm = TRUE)[3])

```
